productDisplayName: Lee Cooper Men Black Casual Shoes
description: Look trendy and stay comfortable in these stylish lifestyle shoes from lee cooper. This pair of shoes is a fresh take on the classic design and will look cool along with any casual outfit. Upper Leather uppers for comfort and protection Stitch detailing Slip on style for additional comfort Looped lace detailing on the sides for enhanced style Leather lining for greater comfort Brand name on the mid-foot Mid-sole Cushioned sock-liner to for exemplary comfort Phylon mid-sole for comfort and stability Out-sole Rubber out-sole with wave-like and pentagonal grooves shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust
